widgets.title: Error Rate
widgets.nrql_query: SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE error IS true) FROM Transaction WHERE appName = '{{ app_name }}' TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: Error Count
widgets.nrql_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Transaction WHERE appName = '{{ app_name }}' AND error IS true TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: Error Types
widgets.nrql_query: SELECT count(*) FROM TransactionError WHERE appName = '{{ app_name }}' FACET error.class SINCE 1 hour ago

widgets.title: Top Error Messages
widgets.nrql_query: SELECT count(*), message FROM TransactionError WHERE appName = '{{ app_name }}' FACET message LIMIT 10 ORDER BY count(*) DESC SINCE 1 hour ago

widgets.title: Error Rate by Transaction
widgets.nrql_query: SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE error IS true) FROM Transaction WHERE appName = '{{ app_name }}' FACET name TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: Browser Error Rate
widgets.nrql_query: SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE eventType() = 'JavaScriptError') FROM JavaScriptError WHERE appName = '{{ app_name }}' TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: HTTP Error Codes
widgets.nrql_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Transaction WHERE appName = '{{ app_name }}' AND httpResponseCode >= '400' FACET httpResponseCode SINCE 1 hour ago

widgets.title: Error Impact on Users
widgets.nrql_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT session) FROM PageView WHERE appName = '{{ app_name }}' AND eventType() = 'JavaScriptError' TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: Recent Error Events
widgets.nrql_query: SELECT * FROM TransactionError WHERE appName = '{{ app_name }}' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 20
